identity.name: BrainBattle
identity.core_concept: A high-stakes intellectual arena set in a digital void. Raw, brutalist, and precise.

Button.base: rounded-none border border-white/20 bg-transparent px-8 py-4 font-['Space_Mono'] uppercase tracking-widest text-white transition-all duration-300

Input.base: rounded-none border-b-2 border-white/20 bg-transparent px-0 py-4 font-['Space_Mono'] text-lg text-white placeholder:text-white/30 focus:border-[#CCFF00] focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 transition-colors

Card.base: rounded-none border border-white/10 bg-[#0A0A0A] p-8 hover:border-white/30 transition-colors relative overflow-hidden group

Badge.base: rounded-none border border-[#CCFF00] bg-[#CCFF00]/10 px-3 py-1 font-['Space_Mono'] text-xs font-bold text-[#CCFF00] uppercase

visual_enhancers.noise_overlay: fixed inset-0 z-50 pointer-events-none opacity-[0.03] mix-blend-overlay bg-[url('https://grainy-gradients.vercel.app/noise.svg')]
visual_enhancers.3d_elements: Abstract geometric shapes (Tetrahedrons, Icosahedrons) floating in void using React Three Fiber

motion.page_transition: initial={{ opacity: 0, y: 20 }} animate={{ opacity: 1, y: 0 }} exit={{ opacity: 0, y: -20 }} transition={{ duration: 0.5, ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1] }}
motion.glitch_effect: occasional css glitch on hover for headings

images.hero_bg: Use 3D canvas instead of static image

Landing.structure: Hero (3D interactive logo + PIN input) -> Feature Grid (Bento style) -> CTA
Landing.vibe: Cinematic entry. The PIN input should feel like launching a missile.

Lobby.structure: Split screen. Left: Team A (Red/Orange), Right: Team B (Blue/Cyan). Center: VS badge.

Game.structure: Question (Center, Huge text). Answers (Grid 2x2). Timer (Progress bar top).
Game.vibe: High focus. Minimal distractions. Explosion effects on correct answer.

Leaderboard.structure: Vertical list, but rank 1 is massive. Glitch effects on score updates.
Leaderboard.vibe: Hall of Fame / Hall of Shame.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. INSTALL FONTS FIRST: Add the Google Fonts link to public/index.html head.
2. SETUP TAILWIND: Update tailwind.config.js to extend theme with colors and fonts defined above.
3. GLOBAL STYLES: Add the noise overlay to App.tsx or index.css so it persists everywhere.
4. COMPONENTS: Build the 'BrutalistButton' and 'BrutalistCard' first, then use them everywhere. Do not use default Shadcn styles; override them heavily with rounded-none and distinct borders.
5. 3D: Create a <Background3D /> component using R3F. Keep it lightweight (low poly count, simple rotation).
6. ANIMATION: Wrap page content in <motion.div> for smooth entry.
7. DATA-TESTID: Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.

do_not: Do not use gradients on text.
Do not use standard blue/primary colors.
Do not center text unless it is a massive headline.
must_do: Use uppercase for labels and buttons.
Ensure high contrast (WCAG AA) - use white on black, black on acid green.
